name: Mediterranean Meatballs with Yogurt & Feta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup chopped fresh flat leaf parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix meat, parsley, egg, crumbs, garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Shape into 1-inch meatballs.
3. Heat oil in a medium skillet.
4. Add meatballs to the skillet.
5. Cook on medium-low heat for 12 to 15 minutes or until cooked through, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve with Yogurt & Feta Sauce.
